apply_debuff.name: Apply Debuff
apply_debuff.description: Apply a generic debuff status to the target.

apply_control.name: Apply Control
apply_control.description: Apply a generic control status to the target.

apply_dot.name: Apply Damage Over Time
apply_dot.description: Apply a generic damage-over-time status to the target.

cleanse_one.name: Cleanse One
cleanse_one.description: Remove one negative status from the user or an ally.

cleanse_all.name: Cleanse All
cleanse_all.description: Remove all negative statuses from the user or an ally.

cleanse_category.name: Cleanse Category
cleanse_category.description: Remove all statuses of a specific category from the user or an ally.

extend_status.name: Extend Status
extend_status.description: Extend the duration of an active status on the target.

shorten_status.name: Shorten Status
shorten_status.description: Reduce the duration of an active status on the target.

transfer_status.name: Transfer Status
transfer_status.description: Transfer a negative status from the user to the target.
